documents.title: Technology–Industry Classification
documents.content:
Query: Regulatory Specctrum Monitoring
Target year: 2035
Regulatory domain: spectrum regulation
Primary technology (M): Regulatory Specctrum Monitoring
Main industry: telecommunications
Query intent: Regulatory Specctrum Monitoring
Related technologies: Regulatory Specctrum Monitoring, Open RAN, 5G Core, Network Slicing, Massive MIMO, Cognitive Radio, Military SATCOM, Electronic warfare systems, Secure tactical radio, Avionics datalink
Related industries: defense, aerospace, satellite, broadcasting, smart cities
Technology taxonomy (TOD):
  - Spectrum & RF Systems: Regulatory Specctrum Monitoring, Dynamic Spectrum Sharing
  - AI/Big Data: Big data software, AI Software
Industry : Cognitive Radio, Military SATCOM, Electronic warfare systems, Secure tactical radio
Industry : Avionics datalink, Satellite payloads, UAV communication, Air-to-ground links
Industry : LEO satellite communication, Non-terrestrial networks, Ground segment systems, Dynamic Spectrum Sharing
Industry : Terrestrial broadcast systems, Media delivery platforms, DVB transmission, Dynamic Spectrum Sharing
Industry : Urban IoT networks, Smart metering, Municipal connectivity platforms, Dynamic Spectrum Sharing

documents.title: DVI Signal Classification
